---
name: General maintainer triage
about: Use only when the structured issue forms do not fit.
title: '[TASK] '
labels: type:task, priority:P2, risk:medium
assignees: oaslananka
---

## Problem

Describe the maintenance task, governance gap, or repository concern.

## Required changes

List the files, settings, workflows, labels, or docs that should change.

## Validation

List the commands or GitHub checks that will prove this is complete.

## Notes

Do not use this template for private vulnerabilities, support questions, bugs,
feature requests, documentation tasks, or public security hardening. Use the
dedicated issue forms for those paths.
